legal_jurisdictional.label: Legal & Jurisdictional
legal_jurisdictional.description: Regulatory classification, investor rights, enforceability, and jurisdictional risk.

valuation_oracles.label: Valuation & Oracles
valuation_oracles.description: NAV methodology, pricing sources, oracle integrity, and fair-value reliability.

custody_asset_control.label: Custody & Asset Control
custody_asset_control.description: Segregation, custodian quality, bankruptcy-remoteness, and audit coverage.

kyc_aml_permissioning.label: KYC / AML & Permissioning
kyc_aml_permissioning.description: Investor onboarding controls, sanctions screening, and on-chain transfer restrictions.

secondary_market_liquidity.label: Secondary Market Liquidity
secondary_market_liquidity.description: Market depth, redemption windows, bid-ask spreads, and transfer restrictions.

settlement_finality.label: Settlement Finality
settlement_finality.description: DVP settlement, on-chain finality, reversibility risk, and dispute resolution.
